macro.title: Higher Mortgage Rates Push Pending Home Sales Down for Second Straight Week
macro.what: Some would-be homebuyers are hesitating as housing costs rise and the ongoing Iran war makes the economy feel shaky
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: 29% of U.S. Homebuyers Paid Cash in March–the Lowest Share For That Month Since 2020
macro.what: With hundreds of thousands more home sellers than buyers in the market, fewer house hunters feel inclined to make cash offers to stand out in bidding wars
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: The case for Non-QM: Serving the new American workforce
housing.what: The modern American workforce is increasingly composed of freelancers, gig workers and entrepreneurs whose complex incomes don't fit traditional mortgage underwriting standards
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Anthony Lamacchia: Zillow-MRED battle shows risks of ‘listing war’
housing.what: Anthony Lamacchia breaks down the Chicago Zillow–MRED fight, Clear Cooperation and why an MLS “listing war” would hurt consumers and agents.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Coming Soon in Chicago: A One-Bedroom Condo in the City, a Big House in the Suburbs and More
housing.what: In this edition of Coming Soon–a series from Redfin News that explores new listings that house hunters can find early only on Redfin.com and Compass.com–we’re exploring five different listings in the Chicago metro area
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: New home sales stumble in April, as affordability pressures mount
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Rent stabilization fracas shapes Providence mayoral contest
housing.what: Providence, Rhode Island’s city council passed rent stabilization but failed to override the mayor’s veto
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: How Designers and Real Estate Pros Use Facebook Marketplace to Add Character to a Home

notables.title: CMLS urges antitrust regulators to back MLS collaboration
